script: echo '===== Recent activity since restart =====' && A=/home/azureuser/.emily-claude-bot/activities.jsonl; if [ -f $A ]; then echo "total: $(wc -l < $A)"; tail -3 $A | jq -c '{ts, body_summary: ((.body|fromjson) | {type, conv: .conversation.conversationType, from: .from.name, text: (.text // "")[:60]})}' 2>&1; else find /home/azureuser -maxdepth 3 -name 'activities.jsonl' -path '*emily*' 2>/dev/null; fi; echo; echo '===== Recent outbound =====' && O=/home/azureuser/.emily-claude-bot/outbound.jsonl; if [ -f $O ]; then echo "total: $(wc -l < $O)"; tail -3 $O | jq -c '{ts, chat: (.chat_id // "?"|.[:30]), text: ((.text // "")[:60])}' 2>&1; fi; echo; echo '===== Manual SENDER end-to-end test (diagnostic) =====' && CHAT_ID=$(tail -1 $A 2>/dev/null | jq -r '(.body|fromjson).conversation.id'); echo "using chat_id: $CHAT_ID"; if [ -n "$CHAT_ID" ] && [ "$CHAT_ID" != "null" ]; then EMILY_TEAMS_CATALOG_ID=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name emily-claude-teams-catalog-id --query value -o tsv 2>/dev/null) /home/azureuser/emily-claude-send-to.sh '✅ Diagnostic — Emily Claude credential fix verified.' "$CHAT_ID" 2>&1 | tail -5; echo "sender_rc=$?"; else echo 'no recent chat id — cannot run end-to-end test'; fi
